title: Change Tab Events
description: Studio UI for **Change Tab Events**: lifecycle history from `ChangeDetailDto.history`, loaded through `SpecdDataPort` and rendered as expandable accordions. Works for **active** and **archived** changes (archived detail comes from `getArchivedChange`).
context: Studio UI for **Change Tab Events**: lifecycle history from `ChangeDetailDto.history`, loaded through `SpecdDataPort` and rendered as expandable accordions. Works for **active** and **archived** changes (archived detail comes from `getArchivedChange`).

rules.requirement: events tab renders change detail history
rules: The Events tab MUST render `history[]` from the loaded `ChangeDetailDto` passed by the shell. It MUST NOT call artifact or graph endpoints. For **active** changes, while Events (or Overview) is visible, the shell MUST refetch detail via `getChange` when the global change poll tick advances (`useChangesRead` with `detailRefreshKey`). For **drafted** and **discarded** changes, the shell MUST refetch via `getDraft` / `getDiscarded` through the same hook with the correct `listSection`. For **archived** changes, history MUST come from the archived snapshot (`getArchivedChange`) without live polling.
The UI MUST display events in reverse chronological order (most recent at the top) without mutating the DTO order on the wire.

Each history row MUST be a collapsible accordion item using the shadcn **`Accordion`** component (with `type="multiple"`). The interaction pattern MUST be consistent with change **Artifacts** type groups (`ui:change-tab-artifacts`): chevron, clickable header, `aria-expanded`.

- **Collapsed:** summary shows `type`, `at`, and a single-line actor when `by` is present.
- **Expanded:** panel shows `by` when present, then **all other fields** on `ChangeHistoryEventDto` except `type` and `at` (e.g. `from`/`to`, `cause`, `specIds`, `artifactHashes`, sync deltas) as labeled rows. Object or array values MAY render in a scrollable monospace block (`max-height` capped). When no extra fields exist, the panel MUST show a short empty-state message.
- **Toggle:** clicking the header expands or collapses that row only; multiple rows MUST stay open at once.
`ChangeEventsTab` MUST receive detail via parent hooks (`useChangesRead` / `useArchivedChange`) and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While detail is loading or fails, the tab MUST show `Loading history…`, a human-readable error, or `No change detail` — matching other change tabs.

rules.requirement: component SHALL avoid infinite render loops from unstable dependencies
rules: The Events tab component SHALL stabilize all array and object references passed as dependencies to downstream components or hooks. It MUST use `useMemo` for derived mappings (including reversed history lists) and use static constants for default empty values to ensure stable prop references.

scenarios.requirement: events tab renders change detail history
scenarios.name: Active change shows history from getChange
given: an active change with lifecycle history
then: rows reflect ChangeDetailDto.history
AND no artifact or graph port methods are invoked from the tab component

scenarios.requirement: events tab renders change detail history
scenarios.name: Archived change shows snapshot history
then: history renders from getArchivedChange detail
AND no live change-status polling runs for that context

scenarios.requirement: events tab renders change detail history
scenarios.name: Shell refetches detail while Events is visible
given: active change and Events tab visible
then: shell reloads change detail (history may update)
AND Events tab receives the new detail prop

scenarios.name: Latest event appears at top
given: history ordered oldest-to-newest on the wire
then: the first visible row is the most recent event
AND older events appear below

scenarios.name: Collapsed row shows summary only
when: user has not expanded a row
then: row shows event type, at, and actor line when by exists
AND detail fields are hidden

scenarios.name: Click expands full event payload
given: a transitioned event with from and to on the DTO
then: expanded panel lists from, to, and by
AND chevron indicates open state (aria-expanded=true)

scenarios.name: Complex values use scrollable monospace block
given: an event field whose value serializes to multi-line JSON (e.g. artifactHashes)
then: that field renders in a bounded scrollable monospace block
AND single-line scalars stay inline

scenarios.name: Event with only base fields shows empty detail message
given: a history event whose DTO has only type, at, and optional by
then: panel shows that no additional fields are present
AND summary remains visible

scenarios.name: Click again collapses row
then: detail panel hides
AND summary line remains visible

scenarios.name: Multiple rows may stay expanded
when: user expands two different row headers
then: both detail panels are visible
AND collapsing one does not collapse the other

scenarios.name: Events tab exposes stable test ids
given: Events tab with at least one event
then: container has data-testid="studio-events-tab"
AND each row has data-testid="studio-event-row-{index}" with zero-based index

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected
then: @specd/ui does not import @specd/core
AND ChangeEventsTab does not call the port directly

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: shell loads change detail for Events
then: calls go through SpecdDataPort (getChange or getArchivedChange)
AND no direct repository or kernel import in the tab

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Loading without detail shows spinner text
given: detail request in flight and no cached detail
then: UI shows Loading history…

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: detail hook rejects with an error
then: UI renders the error message
AND does not show a stale history list

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Missing detail shows empty state
given: no detail object after load settled
then: UI shows No change detail

scenarios.requirement: component SHALL avoid infinite render loops from unstable dependencies
scenarios.name: Events tab memoizes reversed history
then: events array reference remains stable
AND downstream Accordion does not perform unnecessary reconciliation
